title: HP India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: HP India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
HP India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Chandigarh operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About HP India:
HP India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HP India!
